name: Lorenzo Vayne // Bath time
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men/T4T』

The winter was the absolute worst. The cold hands, the runny nose and slipping through the snow. What a dream…

Well, it did give him a good excuse to relax with you in bath. Maybe do a little more than just relaxing..

_____________________________

Lazy bot so the possibility of many mistakes is definitely there 🌞 feel free to point them out, I can take the embarrassment 😞 (jk pls do point them out)

First t4t bot, kinda nervous!!… I hope you guys like it. I really do need to make more trans bots tbh 🙁💔

One more thing, PLEASE don’t leave reviews about him talking about a penis. Giving himself one or you, that’s not something I control unfortunately. Please keep reminding him you both don’t have a penis or put it in chat memory. Just make sure to really get it in that ai brain or something…
